summary: Email Template Redesign (v2.0) Backend Testing - Iteration 78. Verified backend compiles without TypeScript errors, all API endpoints operational, and email design system module correctly imported. All 14 backend tests passed. Email code paths execute successfully (Resend sandbox mode limits actual delivery).
critical_code_review_comments: emailDesignSystem.ts correctly exports all tokens: EmailColors, EmailFonts, EmailSpacing, EmailRadius, EmailShadows, primaryButtonStyle, successButtonStyle, highlightBox, successBox, warningBox, cardBlock, detailRow
Base template (getEmailTemplate) properly uses design system tokens - all 29+ emails inherit v2.0 styling
Key emails (sendNewLeadNotification, sendQuoteEmail, sendVerificationEmail, sendMeetingConfirmationEmail, etc.) updated with design system
Resend sandbox warning correctly displayed on startup - expected behavior
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email template redesign v2.0 complete and verified. Backend compiles without errors, all cron jobs running (weekly digest, onboarding, quote follow-up, scheduled emails, meeting reminders). Email design system exports: EmailColors (brand, surfaces, borders, text, semantic), EmailFonts (Bricolage Grotesque, Instrument Sans), EmailSpacing (xs-xxl), EmailRadius (button, card, badge), EmailShadows (card, elevated), button styles, and HTML block helpers. All API endpoints tested and functional.
